productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Navy White Track Pant
description: CompositionFull length navy track pants made of 100% polyester, with mesh lining and three patent stripes along the sides, draw-strings and zipper at leg ends, handy welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the leftFittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironThese adidas track pants are designed to add comfort and style while you focus on your performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these black adidas track pants keep you comfortably cool. The drawstrings at the bottom along with the zipper allow you to adjust the length of the pants to suit your comfort level, while the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly. The white strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement, while the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
